description: Wire connections between XIAO nRF54L15 and BNO085 breakout for I2C operation
orientation: Both boards chip-side UP. XIAO antenna/USB-C on top, BNO085 component side faces XIAO.

connections.notes: BNO085 VIN accepts 3-5V; feeding 3.3V from XIAO regulator
I2C data, I2C0 on nRF54L15 (P1.10), BNO085 has 10K pull-up
I2C clock, I2C0 on nRF54L15 (P1.11), BNO085 has 10K pull-up
